zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Wotton於大約1342年出生在英國戴文維德沃希時，他的父親Richard de Wotton19歲，母親Julian le Prouz11340歲。他於大約1371年與Gundred Wyger在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1393年之前在英國，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 瑪麗 阿布其 煙雨 聖 勞倫斯 龐特尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Wotton于大约1342年出生在英国戴文維德沃希时，他的父亲Richard de Wotton19岁，母亲Julian le Prouz11340岁。他于大约1371年与Gundred Wyger在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1393年之前在英国，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 瑪麗 阿布其 煙雨 聖 勞倫斯 龐特尼。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wotton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wooten
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called with Old English wid(u), wudu ‘wood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, such as Wootton in Northamptonshire or Oxfordshire, Wootton Bassett in Wiltshire, Wotton in Surrey, and Wotton under Edge in Gloucestershire.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Wotton was born about 1342, in Widworthy, Devon, England, his father, Richard de Wotton, was 19 and his mother, Julian le Prouz, was 11340. He married Gundred Wyger about 1371, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died before 1393, in England, and was buried in London St Mary Abchurch with St Lawrence Pountney, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Wotton est né environ 1342, à Widworthy, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Wotton, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Julian le Prouz, avait 11340 ans. Il a épousé Gundred Wyger environ 1371, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé avant 1393, à Angleterre, et a été enterré à London St Mary Abchurch with St Lawrence Pountney, Middlesex, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Wotton è nato il circa 1342 nel Widworthy, Devon, England, il suo padre, Richard de Wotton, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Julian le Prouz, aveva 11340 anni. Lui sposato Gundred Wyger circa 1371, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì prima del 1393, nel England, e fu sepolto a London St Mary Abchurch with St Lawrence Pountney, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Wottonが約1342年にイギリスデボンウィドウオルシーで生まれた時，父Richard de Wottonは19歳，母Julian le Prouzは11340歳であった。約1371年にイギリスイギリスデボンでGundred Wygerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1393年以前にイギリスで死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト マリー アブチャーチ ウィス スト ラウレンス ポウントニーにて埋葬された。

ko.London St Mary Abchurch with St Lawrence: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 메리 압c후르치 위스 스트 로렌스 파우트니
ko.lifeSummary: William de Wotton(이)가 대략 1342년 영국 데폰 위드워시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Wotton(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Julian le Prouz(은)는 11340세였다. 그는 대략 1371년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Gundred Wyger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1393년 이전 영국에서 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 메리 압c후르치 위스 스트 로렌스 파우트니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Wotton nasceu aproximadamente 1342, em Widworthy, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Wotton, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Julian le Prouz, tinha 11340 anos. Ele casou-se com Gundred Wyger aproximadamente 1371, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 1393, em Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em London St Mary Abchurch with St Lawrence Pountney, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.London St Mary Abchurch with St Lawrence: лондон ст мэри абчурч вит ст ларенс поунтни, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Wotton родился около 1342 г. в местности видворти, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Wotton было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Julian le Prouz, 11340. Он женился на женщине по имени Gundred Wyger около 1371 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер перед 1393 г. в местности Англия и был похоронен в местности лондон ст мэри абчурч вит ст ларенс поунтни, миддлесекс, Англия.
